title: warp_reduce_sum multi-thread source-to-silicon
scope_note: Pure fixture + artifact cycle per task spec. No compiler source touched.

builtin_status.gpu_warp_shuffle (idx): WIRED  (shfl.sync.idx.b32 — u32 only, idx-mode, RFC 055 P4+)
builtin_status.binop_modulo: WORKED via subtraction substitution (a - (a/32)*32) — but a/32 itself is gap

kernel_hang_root_cause: Undefined PTX registers (%fd18 from shfl arm, %rd20/%rd21/%rd25 from `/` arms) retain garbage values. `mask > 0` predicate (line 74) stays true forever because `mov.u64 %rd16, %rd20` propagates undefined data into the mask Local each iteration.
per_warp_outputs: N/A (kernel hung before reaching lane-0 store arm; cuCtxSynchronize timed out)

follow_ons.N71_A: Wire gpu_warp_shuffle_xor → shfl.sync.bfly.b32 (compiler/codegen/nvptx_target.hexa L927 sibling arm + PTX_OP_SHFL_SYNC_BFLY_B32 constant + lower_test Case-9 sibling)
follow_ons.N71_B: Extend warp-shuffle to FP64 (compose 2× u32 halves via mov.b32 {%r_lo,%r_hi},{%fd}; 2× shfl; mov.b64)
follow_ons.N71_C: Wire integer `/` binop → div.s64 / div.u64 (sibling to existing add/sub/mul emit arms)
